title: Donations Context Pack
description: Structured knowledge for donors, transactions, batches, deposits, campaigns, and reconciliation evidence.

objects.name: Donor
objects.description: A contact with giving history, campaign attribution, and receipting context.

objects.name: Transaction
objects.description: Individual donation or refund event tied to a donor, campaign, and payment state.

objects.name: Deposit
objects.description: Bank-facing grouping used for settlement, reconciliation, and ledger matching.

objects.name: Campaign
objects.description: Giving initiative used for attribution, fundraising pages, and performance reporting.

relationships.description: Donors accumulate giving history through one or more transactions.
Settled gifts should roll into a single deposit or reconciliation grouping.
Campaign attribution supports fundraising reporting and appeal analysis.

available_actions.description: Load transactions, deposits, batches, and campaign totals for a bounded period.
Check for orphaned transactions, unmatched deposits, refunds, and total variance.
Prepare reclassification, deposit correction, or donor attribution adjustments for approval.

diagnostics.purpose: Detect when transaction sums do not match deposit totals or settlement records.
Identify gifts without a donor, campaign, batch, or deposit link.

common_operational_issues.issue: Monthly reconciliation fails because deposits do not align with transaction totals.
symptoms: variance between bank and dashboard totals
campaign dashboard lower than finance report
likely_causes: manual transaction entry without campaign assignment
